title: [codereview] KISS: kiss_encode uses conservative worst-case buffer check
description: The pre-check assumes every data byte requires escaping (data_len*2 +4). This rejects buffers that would suffice for actual data (only FEND/FESC escaped). Match Rust impl by using incremental checks during encoding. Priority P2 as it limits usability of kiss_encode API for callers with tight buffers. See rust/lichen-kiss/src/framing.rs:276 and kiss_escape. Also update docstring.
